title: 79 Crude Bombs Seized In West Bengal Ahead Of Phase-2 Polls: MHA Hands Probe To NIA, ECI Gives State Police 24-Hour Ultimatum
description: The MHA has asked the NIA to probe the seizure of 79 crude bombs in South 24 Parganas, citing national security concerns, as the ECI’s 24-hour ultimatum to Bengal Police to arrest bomb-makers.
